code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(){const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const handleSubmit=event=>{event.preventDefault();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"form-page container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Welcome Back"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Sign in to monitor your urban drainage network."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"email",children:"Email Address"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{id:"email",type:"email",placeholder:"admin@urbandrainx.com",value:email,onChange:event=>setEmail(event.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"password",children:"Password"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{id:"password",type:"password",placeholder:"Enter your password",value:password,onChange:event=>setPassword(event.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"submit-btn",children:"Login"})]})]})});}export default Login;
